name: malformed-json
description: Manifest digest computation MUST fail for malformed JSON

tests.name: null_literal
tests.description: JSON null is not a valid manifest (must be object)

tests.name: array_literal
tests.description: JSON array is not a valid manifest (must be object)

tests.name: string_literal
tests.description: JSON string is not a valid manifest (must be object)

tests.name: number_literal
tests.description: JSON number is not a valid manifest (must be object)

tests.name: utf8_bom
tests.input_note: UTF-8 BOM (0xEF 0xBB 0xBF) followed by valid JSON
tests.description: UTF-8 BOM prefix is not valid JSON

tests.name: control_character_in_string
tests.input_note: Literal tab character in string (not escaped)
tests.description: Unescaped control characters in strings are invalid JSON

notes: Per attestation.md Section 4.1.2: Verification MUST fail if manifest.json cannot be parsed as JSON or canonicalized.
